text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Pokke! For my present, I've
made my Special 100% Sincere Parfait—I do
hope you enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, no thanks. There's no way that parfait's
gonna be safe to eat.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm hurt. Then how about I make it from scratch in
front of your very eyes?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Wait, so we get to see you put ice cream in the
parfait glass, squeeze whipped cream, and put a
cherry on top and everything?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: You're kidding... Now this I gotta see!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Pokke, it's a trap... Back out now before it's too
late. If you want a parfait, I'll treat you to one.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
If it looks poisonous, I just won't eat it! C'mon,
let's see what kinda parfait Tachyon cooks up.
Yeah, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, what she said! You may probe with your own
two eyes the depth of my sincerity.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My friend and I will keep an eye on you...

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
A'ight then, let's do this! Parfait, parfait. ♪
Tachyon's parfait. ♪
